description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script installing apt packages with `apt-get update -yqq` and `apt-get install wget git zip unzip -yqq`, installs Composer via `curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php`, installs Xdebug via `pecl install xdebug` and enables it with `docker-php-ext-enable xdebug`. Define three jobs—`test:php7.1`, `test:php7.2`, and `test:php7.4`—each using the `php:7.1`, `php:7.2`, and `php:7.4` Docker images respectively, running `php composer.phar install` then `vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml --coverage-text --colors=never`, all in the default test stage with `allow_failure: false`. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
